falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and historical bottom pattern, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index spikes above 30 (a 25% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volatility would suggest extreme market stress, directly contradicting the implied stability of the 'HOLD' signal and blowoff score of 41.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% while the blowoff score rises above 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This divergence in both pattern similarity and blowoff metrics would invalidate the current UNKNOWN verdict by showing a fundamental shift in market dynamics.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
